name: Evidence-guided first experiment for pedestrian_trajectory_prediction
hypothesis: A small, controlled modification aligned with topic priorities can test whether the research direction is feasible: preserve baseline_original outputs; smoke-test every change before full training; prefer small conditioning changes over broad rewrites.
baseline: LED VIRAT baseline, Leapfrog Diffusion Model
modification: Plan a minimal intention-conditioning experiment that can be toggled from cfg/virat without changing baseline outputs. Integration points: Add optional per-agent intention/language features in VIRATDataset output. Fuse optional condition features in data_preprocess before initializer/denoiser calls. Inject condition features into LEDInitializer mean/variance/scale branches.

acceptance_criteria.metric_check: compare against baseline on the same split

rollback_plan: keep changes as a reviewable patch; do not auto-commit
